# hammer

> ai producer. ten-plus years on broadcast and agency pipelines, now producing with ai. la · ny · remote. brand systems, agents + digital twins, motion graphics, vfx + cgi, pipelines, interactive demos, film + animation, websites.

Important context:
- canonical url: https://hammer.ad
- public brand: Hammer / hammer, not the domain name
- primary entity: Jeff Hammer, AI Producer
- contact: hammer@hammer.ad
- site model: visual-only portfolio. no blog, no /notes, no /process, no /lab.
- best agent entry points: /llms-full.txt, /.well-known/agents.json, /sitemap.xml, /sitemap-priority.xml, /memories/jeff.md.

## work

- [atrium](https://hammer.ad/work): 8 portfolio categories. each a collection of pieces.
- [brand systems](https://hammer.ad/work/brand-systems): identities built with ai in the loop. hammer · kira · effigy · agentify dossiers are live; Kira covers the agent identity, bible, and website. The Agentify dossier links to https://agentify.nexus/brand-bible.
- [agents + digital twins](https://hammer.ad/work/agents-digital-twins): autonomous characters and sensor-fed system twins. Kira detail is live at /work/agents-digital-twins/kira.
- [motion graphics](https://hammer.ad/work/motion-graphics): programmatic motion built in remotion + hyperframes. motion graphics reel, icm teaser, audio reactive overlays, and Spring Health showcase are live.
- [vfx + cgi](https://hammer.ad/work/vfx-cgi): Blender, ComfyUI, OpenUSD, and environment transformation pipelines. environment swap and blender look-dev pipeline details are live.
- [pipelines + tools](https://hammer.ad/work/pipelines-tools): the tools beneath the work. pipeline visualizer, prompt library, and creative skills are live detail surfaces.
- [interactive + playable](https://hammer.ad/work/interactive-playable): live capped demos. prompt-to-storyboard, character consistency, Kira chat, and dot discipline.
- [film + animation](https://hammer.ad/work/film-animation): commercial film and ai-native video. Equinox campaign detail is live at /work/film-animation/equinox.
- [websites](https://hammer.ad/work/websites): ai-native websites. hammer, agentify.nexus, onlykira.ai, and opencrawl.gg have Hammer preview pages, then link to the live sites.

## about

- [bio](https://hammer.ad/about): jeff hammer. tribune media → discovery → comcast → starz entertainment. clients include cadillac, porsche, lululemon, fox, columbia, hulu, ihg hotels, rémy martin.

## contact

- [say hi](https://hammer.ad/contact): hammer@hammer.ad. taking projects, 48-hour reply.

## colophon

- [colophon](https://hammer.ad/colophon): typefaces, build stack, models used, deploy info. nothing hidden.

## agent-readable

- [full context](https://hammer.ad/llms-full.txt): compact plain-text summary of the site, entity, routes, route intent, and public contact facts.
- [agent manifest](https://hammer.ad/.well-known/agents.json): JSON manifest for automated readers, with canonical routes and crawl policy.
- [sitemap](https://hammer.ad/sitemap.xml): full canonical URL inventory.
- [priority sitemap](https://hammer.ad/sitemap-priority.xml): compact indexation set for the most important Hammer pages.
- [robots](https://hammer.ad/robots.txt): crawler access rules. AI search and crawler user agents are explicitly allowed.

## memory

- [jeff.md](https://hammer.ad/memories/jeff.md): MEMORY.md in hermes-agent format (☤). frozen-snapshot summary of the operator behind the site.
